FX.title: Countdown to 150? Synapse Analytics Charts Downside Path for USD/JPY as Risk-Off Accelerates
tldr_points: Geopolitical tensions and equity market weakness boost JPY safe-haven demand
Upcoming US Treasury auction adds volatility but risk sentiment dominates
Technical break below MA20 and RSI dip confirm bearish bias
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY bears target 150 as risk aversion intensifies; technicals reinforce downside.
FX.comment: Bearish tactical setup on risk-off sentiment and technical breakdown below MA20.

STOCKS.title: S&P 500 Bullish Breakout Targets 5,300 Amid Geopolitical Easing
tldr_points: Resistance at 5,300 tested as Iran ceasefire reduces risk premium
MA20 support holds, price trading 1.5% above trend
RSI(14) at 68 – bullish but approaching overbought threshold
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 rallies on Iran ceasefire, eyeing resistance; RSI near overbought, bullish bias persists.
STOCKS.comment: Upward momentum supported by geopolitical easing and price above MA20

CRYPTO.title: BTC/USD Tactical Outlook: Capital Flow & Regulatory Pulse
tldr_points: Stablecoin regulation tightening may rein in speculative inflows
ETH's strategic shift to stablecoins signals broader institutional shift
Bitcoin payments for Iranian tanker tolls could boost on‑chain activity
CRYPTO.excerpt: Key catalysts and technical drivers point to a bullish bias for BTC/USD with a target near $87,500.
CRYPTO.comment: Technical breakout above MA20 coupled with institutional flow signals a medium‑term rally.
